user.title: Pecron Local — Add Device
user.description: Select a discovered device or add one manually.

auth_method.title: Authentication
auth_method.description: How do you want to provide the device auth key?

manual_key.title: Enter Auth Key
manual_key.description: Paste the base64 auth key from `pecron-monitor --setup` or the ha-pecron integration.

error.login_failed: Login failed — check email and password
error.invalid_auth_key: Auth key must be valid base64
error.no_devices_found: No devices found on this account
error.tsl_fetch_failed: Could not fetch device model information from the cloud
error.no_product_key: No product key stored — please remove and re-add the integration

abort.auth_key_fetch_failed: Could not fetch the device auth key from the cloud
abort.reconfigure_successful: Device model information updated — controls will now use correct data point IDs

reconfigure.title: Refresh Device Model Info
reconfigure.description: Sign in to fetch updated data point IDs for your device model. This fixes controls that show 'unknown' due to model-specific ID differences.
